'''Kurlin Vos''' was a [[sheyf]] of [[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]] and [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] around [[60 BBY/Legends|60 BBY]]. His sister was [[Tinté Vos]].

==Biography==
Kurlin allowed [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]], the [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]] of Kiffu to train the young [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], despite the strong objections of Tinté.

After the deaths of Quinlan's [[Quian Vos|mother]] and [[Pethros Vos|father]], Tinté made Quinlan use his [[Psychometry/Legends|psychometric]] powers to relive their deaths, hoping to turn him to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. This enraged Kurlin, who gave permission for Tholme to take Quinlan to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for training, rather than remaining on Kiffu.

In response to this, Tinté poisoned Kurlin's drink. Having killed her brother, she began her long reign as [[sheyf]].
